title: both A and B, not A but B, not only A but also B

stages.concept:
# Unit 087: both A and B, not A but B, not only A but also B - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **상관접속사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **both A and B** — A와 B 둘 다 (복수 취급)

> **Both** she **and** I like music.
> 그녀와 나 둘 다 음악을 좋아한다.

> He speaks **both** English **and** French.
> 그는 영어와 프랑스어 둘 다 말한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **not A but B** — A가 아니라 B

> **Not** he **but** I am wrong.
> 그가 아니라 내가 틀렸다.

> I want **not** a cat **but** a dog.
> 나는 고양이가 아니라 개를 원한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **not only A but also B** — A뿐만 아니라 B도 (= B as well as A)

> **Not only** she **but also** her brother likes music.
> 그녀뿐만 아니라 그녀의 남동생도 음악을 좋아한다.

> He is **not only** smart **but also** kind.
> 그는 똑똑할 뿐만 아니라 친절하기도 하다.

**Q. 다음 밑줄 친 동사의 형태가 올바르지 않은 것을 고르세요.**
1. Both she and I <u>like</u> music. (둘 다 - 복수 취급)
2. Not he but I <u>am</u> wrong. (B(I)에 일치)
3. Not only she but also her brothers <u>likes</u> music. ✅ (B(brothers)에 일치해야 하므로 like가 맞음)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! both A and B만 항상 복수 취급하고, 나머지는 가장 가까운 주어(B)에 동사를 일치시켜야 해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 다시 요약하면, 주어로 쓰일 때 동사는 **B에 일치**시켜요. (not A but B, not only A but also B)

🧑‍🎓 학생: both A and B(둘 다), not A but B(A 아니라 B), not only A but also B(A뿐 아니라 B도)! 동사 수 일치도 주의해야겠어요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 087: both A and B, not A but B, not only A but also B - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) apples and oranges are delicious.
> **정답** Both

---

**02.** She is not lazy ? hardworking.
> **정답** but

---

**03.** He is not only smart ? also kind.
> **정답** but

---

**04.** ? she and her sister like music.
> **정답** Both

---

**05.** It is not mine ? yours.
> **정답** but

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Both he or she can come.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** or → and

---

**07.** Not only he is smart and also kind.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** and → but

---

**08.** It is not red and blue.
(빨간색이 아니라 파란색이다)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** and → but

---

**09.** Both English or math are important.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** or → and

---

**10.** She is not only pretty and also smart.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** and → but

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그와 나 둘 다 축구를 좋아한다.
he I like soccer.
> **정답** Both, and

---

**12.** 이것은 내 것이 아니라 네 것이다.
It is mine yours.
> **정답** not, but

---

**13.** 그녀는 똑똑할 뿐만 아니라 친절하기도 하다.
She is smart kind.
> **정답** not only, but also

---

**14.** 사과와 바나나 둘 다 맛있다.
apples bananas are delicious.
> **정답** Both, and

---

**15.** 그는 학생이 아니라 선생님이다.
He is a student a teacher.
> **정답** not, but

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그와 그녀 둘 다 노래를 잘한다.
Both and he she sing well
> **정답** Both / he / and / she / sing / well

---

**17.** 이것은 고양이가 아니라 강아지이다.
is It not a cat a dog but
> **정답** It / is / not / a / cat / but / a / dog

---

**18.** 그녀는 예쁠 뿐만 아니라 똑똑하기도 하다.
She is not only pretty but smart also
> **정답** She / is / not / only / pretty / but / also / smart

---

**19.** 영어와 수학 둘 다 중요하다.
Both and English math are important
> **정답** Both / English / and / math / are / important

---

**20.** 그는 가수일 뿐만 아니라 배우이기도 하다.
He not is only a singer but also an actor
> **정답** He / is / not / only / a / singer / but / also / an / actor
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 087: both A and B, not A but B, not only A but also B - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I like ________ seafood and meat.
both
only
so
not
> **정답** both

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They played _______tennis but badminton.
not
only
or
both
> **정답** not

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She was not only smart _______ also nice.
but
both
or
not
> **정답** but

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He not only watched movies but also read
books.
We should not only eat vegetables but also
exercise regularly.
She will choose both me and you.
He called not her or me.
> **정답** He called not her or me.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.[2개]
She was not only amused but also excited.
He is not only handsome but also smartly.
He studied not English but math.
He sent letters to both them and we.
> **정답** He is not only handsome but also smartly., He sent
letters to both them and we.

---

**06.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를
고르시오.
They make not only movies _______ also
dramas.
I like apples, _______ he doesn't like them.
He teaches both math _______ Korean.
He plays not the piano _______ the violin.
> **정답** He teaches both math _______ Korean.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Today is not Tuesday and Monday.
I like not only drawing and also reading
books.
She ate both a sandwich and a salad.
He gave her not a ring but a flower.
> **정답** He gave her not a ring but a flower., She ate both a
sandwich and a salad.

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I was _______ only sad but also angry.
He borrowed ________ an SF novel but a fantasy.
not
both
also
but
> **정답** not

---

**09.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy can speak _______ English and French.
The child ate _______ milk and biscuits.
both
and
but
not
> **정답** both

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장의 의마가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
The movie is fun as well as scary.
The movie is _______ scary but also fun.
both
and
not only
not
> **정답** not only

---

**11.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
그 소설은 재미있을 뿐만 아니라 교육적이다.
The novel is not only interesting but also
educational.
The novel is both interesting and educational.
The novel is not interesting but educational.
The novel is educational as well as interesting.
> **정답** The novel is not only interesting but also
educational., The novel is educational as well as
interesting.

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 창문과 문을 둘 다 열었다.
Tom opened both the window and the door.
Tom opened both the window but the door.
Tom opened not the window but the door.
Tom opened between the window and the
door.
> **정답** Tom opened both the window and the door.

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 치마가 아니라 바지를 입었다.
Amy wore not pants but a skirt.
Amy wore not only a skirt but also pants.
Amy wore not a skirt but pants.
Amy wore not a skirt and pants.
> **정답** Amy wore not a skirt but pants.

---

**14.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진
것을 고르시오.
Not he but I (play) the role.
Both Amy and Tom (take) this class.
play - take
plays - take
play - takes
plays - takes
> **정답** play - take

---

**15.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진
것을 고르시오.
Not only I but also she (want) a break.
I like both (travel) and reading books.
want - travel
wants - traveling
wants - travels
wanted - traveled
> **정답** wants - traveling

---

**16.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 것을 고르시오.
I like volleyball, but I don't like basketball.
I like basketball but volleyball.
I like not basketball but volleyball.
I like not only basketball but also volleyball.
I like both basketball and volleyball.
> **정답** I like not basketball but volleyball.

---

**17.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 것을 고르시오.
My brother is a mechanic. I'm a mechanic, too.
Not only my brother and I are a mechanic.
Not only my brother but also I am a mechanic.
Not only my brother but also I are a mechanic.
Not my brother but I am a mechanic.
• mechanic 기계공
> **정답** Not only my brother but also I am a mechanic.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Not only you but also she
are a good dancer.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Both I and my sister likes
chocolate cake.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** likes → like

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
Both he and she is good at drawing. She enjoys
not only drawing but also taking
photos. She often takes photos of him.
> **정답** are, but also, taking
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 087 both A and B, not A but B, not only A but also B중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 그림을 보고 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
![그림](public/images/units/087_desc_01.webp)
play the guitar
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  but also
sings a song.
정답 not, only, plays, the, guitar

---

**02.** 그림을 보고 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
![그림](public/images/units/087_desc_02.webp)
he, she
  (     )  and  (     )  are eating pizza.
정답 Both, he (she), she (he)

---

**03.** 그림을 보고 주어진 단어를 사용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
![그림](public/images/units/087_desc_03.webp)
the subway
They take not the taxi  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 but, the, subway

---

**04.** 다음 주어진 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
He is not eating spagetti. But he is eating noodles.
He is eating  (     )  spaghetti  (     )  noodles.
정답 not, but

---

**05.** 다음 주어진 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I bought pants as well as sweaters.
I bought  (     )   (     )  sweaters  (     )  
pants.
정답 not, only, but, also

---

**06.** 다음 주어진 문장과 같은 뜻이 되도록 문장을 완성하시오.
I want to travel France. And I want to travel
England, too.
I want to travel  (     )  France  (     )  England.
정답 both, and

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 컴퓨터 게임을 하는 것이 아니라 보고서를 쓰고 있었
다.
힌트 (     ) write a report
He was not playing computer games  (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 but, writing, a, report

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 온라인 수업뿐만 아니라 오프라인 수업도 들어야
한다.
힌트 (     ) online classes, offline classes
We have to take  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  but
also  (     )   (     ) .
정답 not, only, online, classes, offline, classes

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 소설과 시 둘 다 쓴다.
힌트 (     ) novels, poems
She writes  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 both, novels, and, poems

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
이 샐러드는 맛있을뿐만 아니라, 건강에 좋다.
힌트 (     ) delicious, healthy
This salad is  (     )   (     )  well  (     )   (     ) .
정답 healthy, as, as, delicious

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 087: both A and B, not A but B, not only A but also B - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I like ________ pizza and pasta. both only so not
> 정답: both

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They played _______ soccer but basketball. not only or both
> 정답: not

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She was not only kind _______ also talented. but both or not
> 정답: but

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He not only watched dramas but also read comics.
We should not only eat fruit but also exercise regularly.
She will choose both him and me.
He called not her or me.
> 정답: He called not her or me.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She was not only happy but also excited.
He is not only handsome but also smartly.
He studied not math but science.
He sent messages to both them and we.
> 정답: He is not only handsome but also smartly., He sent

---

**06.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
They make not only games _______ also apps.
I like hiking, _______ he doesn't like it.
He reads both novels _______ comics.
He plays not the guitar _______ the piano.
> 정답: He reads both novels _______ comics.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Today is not Monday and Tuesday.
I like not only cooking and also reading books.
She ate both a burger and a salad.
He gave her not a toy but a book.
> 정답: He gave her not a toy but a book., She ate both a

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I was _______ only tired but also hungry.
He borrowed ________ a comic but a novel. not both also but
> 정답: not

---

**09.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom can speak _______ Korean and Japanese.
The boy ate _______ bread and milk. both and but not
> 정답: both

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The game is exciting as well as challenging.
The game is _______ challenging but also exciting. both and not only not
> 정답: not only

---

**11.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 그 영화는 재미있을 뿐만 아니라 감동적이다.
The movie is not only interesting but also touching.
The movie is both interesting and touching.
The movie is not interesting but touching.
The movie is touching as well as interesting.
> 정답: The movie is not only interesting but also

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 창문과 문을 둘 다 닫았다.
Tom closed both the window and the door.
Tom closed both the window but the door.
Tom closed not the window but the door.
Tom closed between the window and the door.
> 정답: Tom closed both the window and the door.

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 모자가 아니라 장갑을 샀다.
Amy bought not gloves but a hat.
Amy bought not only a hat but also gloves.
Amy bought not a hat but gloves.
Amy bought not a hat and gloves.
> 정답: Amy bought not a hat but gloves.

---

**14.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Not he but I (play) the part.
Both Amy and Tom (take) this lesson. play - take plays - take play - takes plays - takes
> 정답: play - take

---

**15.** 괄호 안에 주어진 동사의 형태가 알맞은 것끼리 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Not only I but also she (want) a rest.
I like both (travel) and reading comics. want - travel wants - traveling wants - travels wanted - traveled
> 정답: wants - traveling

---

**16.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 것을 고르시오.
I like baseball, but I don't like soccer.
I like soccer but baseball.
I like not soccer but baseball.
I like not only soccer but also baseball.
I like both soccer and baseball.
> 정답: I like not soccer but baseball.

---

**17.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 것을 고르시오.
My sister is a nurse.
I'm a nurse, too.
Not only my sister and I are a nurse.
Not only my sister but also I am a nurse.
Not only my sister but also I are a nurse.
Not my sister but I am a nurse.
> 정답: Not only my sister but also I am a nurse.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Not  only  you  but  also  he are  a  good  runner. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: are → is
